data.title: Kagari Hibana
data.synopsis:
A boy genius, Hurt, and a flower girl, Hibana. Hibana, a flower girl, is a dropout. The two childhood friends have lived completely different lives since they were small children. Hurt speaks warmly to Hibana to encourage her to run away from the coming-of-age ceremony. However, his voice did not reach her heart. Then, an incident occurred that changed their destiny drastically... A great adventure set in the World Tree. A few years before the day of their journey In the deep forest, what is it that befalls the inexperienced boy and girl...!

(Source: YouTube)

data.title: Ito wo Yoru
data.synopsis:
A schoolgirl track and field athlete takes shelter from the rain at a lonely and secluded bus stop. Shortly after, a student otaku arrives at the same stop to seek shelter from the rain as well. As they talk, their dark desires show themselves and they both satisfy each other sexually.

(Source: TMDB)

data.title: Yababaina
data.synopsis: Music video between the vocaloid voices of Hatsune Miku, Kasane Teto and Zundamon, where the trio saves the day by calming down the super city rampage BS boss.

data.title: Shuumatsu Hospital
data.synopsis: Akao Misuzu is a nurse newly transferred from another hospital. Everything seems normal, except that people die unusually often during her shifts: she offers sexual services to dying people and leads one or two gentlemen to their graves more quickly. The other nurses are on her trail... Will she be able to keep her secret?

This is a stop motion animation of the cotton enchantress Moja and the sewing witch. Their day begins with making Moja's body.

titles.title: 放送室の着ぐるみガール

data.title: Housoushitsu no Kigurumi Girl
data.title_japanese: 放送室の着ぐるみガール
data.synopsis:
Nao Kurusu transferred to an all-girls school in the countryside after her father's job move. While she was trying her best to get used to the new school, she runs into someone in her class wearing a costume. Why are there costumes at school? Who is inside this costume? Nao is curious and tries to find out their identity but...!?

(Source: Official site, translated)

data.title: Jyuragi Wonsijeon
data.synopsis: A girl Niu sets out to find the Papo Spring to save her tribe that has fallen into a deep sleep due to wizard Ferrox's black magic. Together with Imp and Zar, they travel to each dinosaur tribe to collect water, fire, wood, gold (iron), and earth relics. However, the constant interference from Ferox and his gang leads to the great war to decide the fate of the Continent of Gondua.
data.background: The show is loosely based on Korean strategy game with the same title. It was produced for two years by Korean studio Raon Pictures, and notably a French studio sponsored 25% of work while getting the right of distributing it in Europe. American program distributor Moonlight and Canada's AB Production got the contracts for distribution in the U.S. and Canadian markets on TV. In the U.S. the airing began in the second quarter of the year of 2003 and in Canada - in the first quarter. The show was also airing on Arirang TV and Toonyverse. In 2005 the rights were reserved by Insomnia World Sales (France) for the Russian dubbing. It was distributed on DVD in 2008.
